process.title: Spare Part Inventory
process.description: On the first Friday of each month, spare parts are inventoried to ensure inventory records accurately reflect stock counts.
process.usedWhen: Performing the scheduled monthly spare parts inventory audit.

nodes.label: Count all parts in spare part inventory
Compare part totals against Inventory System records
details: Inventory records can be exported using the Export CSV button to simplify reconciliation
tasks: Export Inventory System records using the Export CSV button to simplify reconciliation

nodes.label: Communicate any variation in part counts to Service Manager
